svg.text: THEORETICAL HARMONICS OF 9.A'- ON THE 12-TONE RESONANCE SPIRAL
A = 440 Hz — harmonic positions expressed in duodecimal notation with 144-level microshifts
i = tendency toward the next pitch-class
a = tendency toward the previous pitch-class
The note identity stays the same.
Only the resonance center is shifted.
Numbers inside markers indicate harmonic order. Geometry corrected through φₙ₊₁ = φₙ / ¹²√2.
